what_happened: Critics flagged that LoopForContextPack lacks artifact.type, making an IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN type guard unimplementable without an extra DB fetch. The plan initially specified guarding on both command and artifact type.
why: LoopForContextPack is a narrow interface with only artifactId (not artifact.type). Adding a type guard would require threading artifact type through all callers, adding scope beyond the feature.
fix_applied: Changed guard to command-only (LoopCommand.PLAN). Documented as an architecture decision. Added note that in practice only PLAN commands target IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN artifacts.
pattern_to_remember: When planning DB-backed type guards in loop-context-pack.ts, check LoopForContextPack interface first — it only exposes artifactId, not artifact.type. Command-only guards avoid extra fetches.
